description: Clinical concordance benchmark by running OpenOncology tiered matching directly on label biomarker cases.
vintage_adjustment_note: Concordance uses drug equivalence groups so clinically interchangeable agents across treatment vintages are counted as hits (e.g., BRAF/MEK class substitutions).

coverage_stats.note: high no-prediction rate reflects that most TCGA patients have non-actionable mutations or received chemotherapy rather than targeted therapy

oncologist_drugs: Multi-glioblastoma-peptide-targeting Autologous Dendritic Cell Vaccine ICT-107
Recombinant PRAME Protein Plus AS15 Adjuvant GSK2302025A
Glutathione Pegylated Liposomal Doxorubicin Hydrochloride Formulation 2B3-101
